title: Live Google Translation baseline 10-round benchmark with spend cap

blockers.description: JV-02 intentionally committed only a 20-row synthetic seed fixture. The approved 300-row corpus is assembled by tooling at evaluation time from FLORES-200, ALT, Tatoeba, and the seed, but that downloader/composer output is not present in this worktree. The seed is valid for scorer/validator smoke only and is not the benchmark corpus.

The merged JV-03 harness validates LF-04-v2 artifacts and performs cost preflight, but --with-google still bails before any network request. A live Google baseline cannot be produced until the billable request path, corpus loader, quality scorer, and per-round writer are implemented.
blockers.non_secret_evidence: cargo run --bin mt_bench -- --with-google --google-api-key <synthetic-non-secret> --sample-limit 20 --rounds 10 --cost-cap 3.00 => cost preflight $0.2400, then Error: --with-google is not yet implemented

blockers.description: The current conservative mt_bench estimator uses 60 characters per sample. A full 300-row, 10-round run projects to $3.60, which exceeds the requested $3.00 cap before any billable request. JV-04 needs either actual corpus character-count preflight or an explicitly raised cap before live execution.

cost_cap.abort_reason: Blocked before any Google network request.

privacy.artifact_policy: No source text, target text, Google API key, request URL, or response body is recorded in this blocked artifact.
